name: View Transitions — implementation workflow
description: Ordered steps: (1) Audit every Link/router.push, Suspense boundary, page, persistent chrome, shared visuals, skeleton/content control twins → navigation map. (2) Paste global CSS recipes (+ reduced motion). (3) Isolate persistent elements with `viewTransitionName` + group CSS `animation: none`. (4) Page-level directional VT + `addTransitionType`/`transitionTypes`. (5) Suspense reveal VTs (strings). (6) Shared `name`+`share` pairs + list nesting. (7) Walk every map row: pair formed? fallbacks? defaults correct? chrome static?

metadata.intent: Roll out view transitions systematically without missing a navigation path

must_use: Copy shared recipe CSS verbatim then tune durations only
must_not: Skip audit and sprinkle VT wrappers randomly
conventions: Re-verify after each major navigation class: hierarchical, lateral, suspense, same-route.

steps.description: Step 1 — Build the navigation + suspense map (routes, direction, VT pattern per hop).
Step 2 — Add global recipes from `react-view-transitions-css-recipes` (includes prefers-reduced-motion).
Step 3 — Assign `viewTransitionName` to sticky headers/nav and silence their group animations.
Step 4 — Page-level directional transitions + transition types at navigation sources.
Step 5 — Suspense skeleton/content VT pairs (string classes, `default="none"` on content).
Step 6 — Shared morph names + nested list identity where needed.
Step 7 — Walk each map path checking pair fallbacks, chrome isolation, and accidental auto cross-fades.
